zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin於大約1145年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林時，他的父親Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn36歲，母親Margaret Grathney29歲。他去世於1214年在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin于大约1145年出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林时，他的父亲Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn36岁，母亲Margaret Grathney29岁。他去世于1214年在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin was born about 1145, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Grathney, was 29. He died in 1214, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 70, and was buried in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin est né environ 1145, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grathney, avait 29 ans. Il est décédé en 1214, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin um 1145 in Roslin, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Grathney 29. Er starb 1214 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin è nato il circa 1145 nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Grathney, aveva 29 anni. Morì nel 1214, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslinが約1145年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslynは36歳，母Margaret Grathneyは29歳であった。彼は1214年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで70歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンロスリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Grathney(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1214년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Roslin, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Grathney, tinha 29 anos. Ele faleceu em 1214, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin родился около 1145 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Grathney, 29. Он умер в 1214 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord William Sinclair 4th Lord of Roslin nació aproximadamente 1145, en Roslin, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Grathney, tenía 29 años. Murió en 1214, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.
